'''CUTH-BRT-92-X3''', or '''Cuthbert''', as he was known, was a [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]] mainframe that was installed in [[Montrol City]] on [[Gandle Ott]].

==History==
When the BRT experiment in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] failed, Cuthbert was unplugged and stored in a [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] warehouse for twenty years. Eventually, Cuthbert was shipped out to Gandle Ott to run the colony. Installed as the Montrol City Central Computer, he was modified to prevent him disobeying or undermining [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officials. His programming was also modified on the orders of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] to include an override that would give him access to the BRT's central command core.

Following the liberation of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces, Sarne used [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Olaver Lansel]] to activate Cuthbert's modified programming. Tasked with stopping any New Republic pursuit force, most of Cuthbert's limitations were lifted, allowing him to operate at full capacity. He infiltrated nearly all computers and information networks on the planet in order to complete his task. Not pleased with his task, Cuthbert had no choice but to obey. He attempted to stop the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' peacefully in the beginning, influencing the starport computer to keep bumping the ''FarStar'' down the queue while it awaited landing clearance. He them branded them as thieves who had stolen Imperial property, and alerted Spaceport Security. During the crew's first night staying at the [[Imperial Plaza Hotel]], Cuthbert infiltrated the bar droids and reprogrammed them to slip drugs into their food and drink.

Cuthbert stepped up his campaign, and simulated a radiation leak from the ''FarStar''. Emergency teams responded with radiation-dampening foam, and sprayed the corvette's engines, filling them with gunk. The crew had to manually clean out the engines before they could be fired. Cuthbert's next moves against the crew of the ''FarStar'' were more deadly. He reprogrammed several [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles and used them to target the crew. Finally, he activated an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]], [[RX5-TLN]] to eliminate the crew at the [[Theatre Danske]].

Cuthbert was eventually restored as the crew of the ''FarStar'' and city officials figured out what was happening. Technicians took him off-line and eliminated Sarne's programming.

==Personality and traits==
Cuthbert was a likable computer, and only attempted to harm the crew of the ''FarStar'' when he had no choice.
